ast.match: all|any (default: all; only used when op=semantic_filter)

semantic_filter._comment: Generic Semantic -> Semantic filtering engine (Step 1). Operates only on semantic.json; no traversal, no NLP.

filters.field: string (any top-level semantic field, e.g. category/uniqueId/typeId/parentId/hostId/levelId, or any key inside parameters)

field_resolution_order: 1. top-level key on the semantic object
2. same key name inside the object's parameters map
semantic_filter.numeric_ops_note: gt/gte/lt/lte parse a leading numeric token from the field value (e.g. 90 from "90 minutes"). This is a generic text->number parse only, NOT unit conversion (no ft-in <-> mm normalization).
